cti_detail.title: Threat Intelligence (CTI)

itops_detail.title: IT operations

incidents_detail.title: Incidents
incidents_detail.lead: Case list, priority dossier detail and event timeline.

sekoia_volume_detail.title: Sekoia volume

sekoia_ingest.title: Sekoia.IO — Ingest Logs & Volume
sekoia_ingest.lead: Dedicated space: volume, silent intakes, drops, alerts, heatmaps and incident correlation.

ai.recommendation_closure: Recommendation: validate pivots and exports before closing.
ai.ph_query: e.g. failed authentications on WIN-DC01 between 8am and 10am
ai.fp_service_scans: False positives: service accounts, AD scans
ai.drawer_lead: Suggests queries, Sigma rules and exports (Sekoia, S1, OpenSearch, Timesketch). Review and validate before deployment.
ai.inv_target_label: Investigation target (hostname, IP, event JSON, Sigma rule or free text)

vigil.upload_hint: Uploaded evidence can be correlated with VigilSOC alerts.
vigil.tokens_hint: IT tokens can trigger VigilSOC cross-investigations.
vigil.e2e_none: No E2E run — click to start

tools.asset_investigation_lead: Cross-platform asset investigation (Sekoia events + SentinelOne threats/activities).
tools.timeline_lead: Build a focused timeline, export to Timesketch.
tools.ioc_lead: IOC correlation (IP / domain / hash) across detection platforms.
tools.telemetry_lead: Targeted event collection for a host / IP / agent (no bulk telemetry).
tools.incidents_cert_lead: Same view as Incidents menu — FP-Master list.
tools.incidents_cert_hint: Open via Incidents menu or a CERT Operations hub card.

gov.views_lead: Custom views (inventory + filters) saved on the backend.
gov.sekoia_no_api: Sekoia: no API key listed — UI endpoint unavailable or insufficient permissions. SentinelOne remains shown if configured.
gov.view_filters_hint: The view saves filters currently applied in the selected inventory. Tip: open the inventory, set filters, return here then create the view.

tp.sekoia_assets_lead: Sekoia.IO assets and sources inventory — edit / rename.
tp.sekoia_rules_lead: Sigma rules / detections — enable, disable, change scope.
tp.s1_endpoints_lead: Endpoints & groups — tag, move an endpoint.
tp.s1_policies_lead: Group policies and custom STAR rules — edit.
tp.s1_fetch_lead: Targeted threats & activities for a host / IP / agentId.
tp.sekoia_cc_lead: Sekoia inventory, connectors, modules, formats, playbooks and statistics.
tp.xdr_lead: Merged asset view: Sekoia intakes & events, SentinelOne threats & activities, unified timeline, Timesketch / OpenSearch export.

kb.lead: Analyst guides, procedures and playbooks (FP-Master repository).
kb.slice_playbooks: Filtered view: playbooks and DFIR procedures.

doc.lead: Analyst procedures, tutorials, demo mode and release notes.
doc.tour_overview: 1/5 — Overview: SOC health and tool links.
doc.tour_docs: 2/5 — Documentation: full platform architecture and analyst guides.
doc.tour_ai: 4/5 — SOC Assistant: query and rule help (to be validated).
doc.filters_help: Filters & actions — exports and refresh. No writes in demo mode.

soc.investigation_lead: Pivots and multi-platform summary. Review exports before sharing.
soc.autonomous_lead: Dashboard: detected incidents, anomalies, correlations and suggested actions (analyst validation required).

audit.lead: Change history (intakes, rules, API keys, connectors, secrets, views) — filters & export.

sekoia.panel_lead: Volume, silent intakes, alerts, heatmaps and CERT incident correlation.
sekoia.kpi: Real-time summary: ingested volumes, active intakes, silent signals and open alerts.
sekoia.global: Consolidated Sekoia logs. Silent: WARNING > 5 min, DOWN > 15 min; ≥ 50% drop = 1h vs 24h hourly average.
sekoia.intake: Top intakes by 24h volume, hourly trend, 24h / 7d toggle.
sekoia.techno: Breakdown by technology and 24h volume share.
sekoia.silent: Intakes with no recent events — prioritize WARNING and DOWN.
sekoia.drop: Intakes with ≥ 50% 1h volume drop vs 24h average.
sekoia.heatmap: 24h × intakes and 7d × technology heatmaps; cold zones < 35% of average.
sekoia.heatmap_hint: Volumes derived from ingest_volume / client hourly series. Cold zones = traffic < 35% of the hourly average for the intake.
sekoia.correlation: Correlation drops / silent ↔ CERT and SOC incidents.
sekoia.exports: Export JSON / CSV from the action bar.
sekoia.exports_hint: Per-section exports from the table of contents when tables exist.
sekoia.back_cc_hint: Back to Sekoia Control Center (assets, rules, XDR).
sekoia.hub_lead: Sekoia log volume — intakes, technologies, anomalies.
sekoia.hub_correlation_meta: Drops, silent, CERT and SOC incidents
sekoia.reco_silent_down: Silent intake > 15 min: check connector, credentials and parser ({name}).
sekoia.reco_silent_warn: No logs > 5 min: check the source and Sekoia status ({name}).
sekoia.reco_drop: Volume drop ≥ 50%: correlate with network changes, filtering or pipeline saturation.
sekoia.reco_incidents: {count} CERT incident(s): prioritize triage and additional collection.
sekoia.reco_anomalies: {count} autonomous SOC anomaly(ies): validate in the SOC Autonomous tab.
sekoia.corr_hint: Client-side heuristic correlation: dropping or silent intakes, incidents /api/master/incidents, PortalAI autonomous SOC anomalies.
sekoia.s1_not_queried: ℹ️ SentinelOne not queried: enter hostname, IP or agent ID to correlate S1 threats/activities.

cert_index.overview_lead: SOC summary: platform health, incidents, CTI and ingest — direct access to tools.
cert_index.access_lead: SOC tools, accounts, portal API, ports — shortcuts to tokens, upload and monitoring.
cert_index.cti_lead: Summary, IOCs, connectors and SIEM volume.
cert_index.ingest_lead: Volumes, CERT/IT deposits and file history.
cert_index.cert_ops_lead: Incidents, evidence, IT requests and deposit tokens.
cert_index.it_ops_lead: Exposure, inventory, system health and IT uploads.
cert_index.cases_lead: Open and historical cases — detail, events and tool links per row.
cert_index.refs_lead: Incidents, knowledge base, activity log and documentation.
cert_index.drop_formats: EVTX · Plaso · PCAP · CloudTrail · Syslog · CSV · STIX
cert_index.stats_cumul_hint: Total OpenSearch document count (same source as Grafana cumulative / index health).

empty.no_events: No fp-events found for this case.
empty.no_alerts: No active ingest alerts in this monitoring window.

master.purge_hint: Selective purge with audit log. Confirmation required. Test environment recommended.

hub_intro.platform_doc: Full platform documentation: Docker architecture, ingestion, CTI, observability, security — plus Sekoia, SentinelOne and CERT tool guides.

it.health_lead: IT portal and connected SOC services status.
it.doc_lead: Links to documentation and SOC tools.
it.doc_hint: Use a valid CERT token to submit evidence.
it.admin_lead: IT portal settings and upload limits.

it.dashboard_lead: Submit evidence to CERT using a secure token.

it.no_token_message: No token provided. Contact your CERT team for a secure upload link.
it.ops_lead: Deposit history and CERT processing status.
it.ops_need_token: Sign in with a token to view your operations.
it.ops_empty: No deposits recorded for this case.
it.token_exhausted: This token has already been used ({detail}). Contact CERT.

msg.vue_consolidee_des_logs_sekoia_les_seuil: Vue consolidée logs Sekoia. the thresholds silent sont WARNING > 5 min and DOWN > 15 min; une drop ≥ 50 % compare the volume 1h to the average hourly on 24h.

msg.repartition_par_format_techno_de_log_et_: Répartition by format / technology of log and part relative on the volume total 24h.

access.lead: Access directory: SOC tools, service accounts, portal API, network ports. Use shortcuts for common operations.
access.urls_hint: Full portal URLs — click to open or copy.
access.credentials_admin_hint: Admin and technical accounts — internal reference (.env server).

guide.hub_threat_intel: CTI analyst view: top IOCs, MISP/OpenCTI tags, SIEM volume and connector status. Each card opens the detail panel with exports.
guide.hub_ingest_evidence: Ingest monitoring: indexed volumes, processing errors, recent CERT/IT uploads and active deposit tokens.
guide.hub_cert_ops: CERT operations: active incidents, tickets, incoming IT requests, evidence uploads and audit log.
guide.hub_it_ops: IT operations: perimeter exposure, token inventory, service health, uploads and vulnerabilities.
guide.hub_references: Cross references: FP-Master incidents, knowledge base, activity log and portal documentation.
guide.hub_kb: Knowledge base: Markdown preview of records, playbooks, guides and breakdown by category.
guide.dashboard_it: IT-side indicators: uploads, tokens and tickets.
guide.lead_cert_ops: CERT operations hub: incidents, evidence uploads, IT requests and deposit tokens.
guide.lead_it_ops: IT operations hub: perimeter exposure, service health and upload intake.
guide.lead_ingest: Ingest volumes, CERT/IT uploads and history of received files.

threat.additive_note: does not alter existing modules: adds loaders wired to buttons
threat.auth_bearer_note: authenticate via Authorization: Bearer <SEKOIA_UI_TOKEN>. Secrets are stored encrypted in the connector (/data), never in .env.
threat.sekoia_auth_intro: Sekoia inventories (intakes, rules, formats, connectors, playbooks, telemetry) authenticate via Authorization: Bearer <SEKOIA_UI_TOKEN>. Secrets are stored encrypted in the connector (/data), never in .env.
threat.sekoia_token_required: Enter the SEKOIA_UI_TOKEN (JWT): it is required to load inventories.
threat.fetch_collecting: Collecting… (up to {max} events, may take a few seconds)
threat.fetch_truncated: {shown} events collected out of {total} (cap {max}). Refine filters/range, or increase max events.
threat.fetch_json_limit: {sample} / {total} events (raw JSON, limited to 500 for display)
threat.api_key_help: Durable API key (optional). May stabilize access if the JWT expires; not required for standard UI endpoints. Not stored in .env.

inventory.hero_lead: All platform components: file paths, usage, OSD playbooks, parsers, workers, CTI, rules and interconnections.

api.tokens_warning: Copy endpoints from the Access Center. Do not expose tokens outside the portal session.
api.title: Internal APIs
api.body:
CERT portal REST API

All routes require an authenticated session (cookie) except /api/auth/login.

MethodPathDescription
GET/api/overview/*Service health, ingest, CTI
GET/api/master/*Incidents, KB, dashboards
POST/api/uploadEvidence upload
GET/api/threat/sekoia/*Sekoia proxy
GET/api/threat/s1/*SentinelOne proxy

Full list in Access Center.

sekoia.title: Sekoia.IO
sekoia.body:
Sekoia.IO — analyst guide

Manage cloud detection perimeter: intakes, Sigma rules, API keys, targeted event collection.

  • Assets, Rules, API Keys, On-demand Telemetry, Control Center.
  • JWT SEKOIA_UI_TOKEN required in Platform Configuration.
  • Always filter by hostname/IP before bulk fetch.

sentinelone.title: SentinelOne
sentinelone.body:
SentinelOne — analyst guide

EDR agents, policies, API tokens, threats/activities collection. Correlate with Sekoia via XDR View.

governance.title: Governance
governance.body:
Governance — consolidated inventories

Merged Sekoia + SentinelOne assets, rules, API keys. Saved views via /api/threat/views.

certtools.title: CERT tools
certtools.body:
CERT investigation tools

Asset Investigation, Timeline Builder, IOC Correlation, Assisted Investigation, SOC Analysis, XDR View.

timesketch.title: Timesketch
timesketch.body:
Timesketch — timeline investigation

Access /timesketch/. Auto-import from ingest-worker or manual export from Sekoia/CERT tools. Strict 9-column CSV format.

intelligence.title: SOC Assistant
intelligence.body:
SOC Assistant

Local help for queries, Sigma rules, dashboards, pivots. API: window.PortalAI. Always validate in staging.

tutorials.title: Tutorials
tutorials.body:
Recommended analyst path

  1. Overview — check KPIs.
  2. Platform docs — read Full architecture.
  3. Configure Sekoia JWT.
  4. Sekoia rules inventory.
  5. Targeted fetch on lab host.
  6. SOC Assistant test query.
  7. Audit center review.

tiles.inventory: Premium++ catalog: paths, playbooks, parsers, workers, CTI, interconnections.
tiles.arch: Full Docker, Nginx, services and data flow diagram.
